validation_results.code_quality: High. The logic is cleanly separated into a helper function and a constant list of patterns, making it easy to maintain. The test coverage is comprehensive.
edge_cases_covered: Mixed user files and artifacts (correct count)
Exceeding limit with artifacts (correct user count in warning)
Paths similar to excluded patterns but not actually excluded

rationale: All acceptance criteria have been met. The implementation correctly excludes internal artifacts from the file count constraint and updates the warning message accordingly. The changes are verified by 14 passing unit tests.
